scenes.summary: Nasruddin's neighbor approaches him, seeking advice on managing the cramped living conditions in his small house shared by his family and mother-in-law.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor tells Nasruddin about the cramped living situation in his small house with his family and mother-in-law.
Beat 2: Nasruddin asks if the neighbor has chickens in the yard.
Beat 3: Nasruddin advises the neighbor to bring the chickens inside the house.

scenes.summary: The neighbor tries Nasruddin's advice by bringing chickens inside but finds the situation worse; Nasruddin then suggests bringing in a donkey, escalating the crowding and discomfort.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor complains to Nasruddin that bringing chickens indoors made the house more crowded.
Beat 2: Nasruddin asks if the neighbor has a donkey in the yard.
Beat 3: Nasruddin advises the neighbor to bring the donkey inside the house despite objections.

scenes.summary: Despite adding more animals indoors, the neighbor's home becomes more crowded and unpleasant; Nasruddin suggests bringing the goat inside, intensifying the tension and frustration.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor returns, distressed about the cramped space and noise from family and animals.
Beat 2: Nasruddin asks if the neighbor has a goat.
Beat 3: Nasruddin advises bringing the goat into the house, causing the neighbor to become angry and frustrated.

scenes.summary: The neighbor threatens Nasruddin if he doesn't provide a better solution; Nasruddin then instructs him to remove all the animals from the house, leading to a renewed spacious and happy family home.
beats: Beat 1: Neighbor threatens Nasruddin out of frustration and demands a better solution.
Beat 2: Nasruddin advises the neighbor to take all the animals back outside.
Beat 3: Neighbor follows advice and later happily reports to Nasruddin that the house now feels spacious and peaceful.

characters.name: Nasruddin
characters.description: Wise man known for giving unconventional advice to townspeople.

characters.name: neighbor
characters.description: Man seeking Nasruddin’s advice about cramped living conditions in his house.

characters.name: neighbor's wife
characters.description: Part of the neighbor’s family, affected by cramped house.

characters.name: neighbor's three kids
characters.description: Children in the crowded house causing familial tension.

characters.name: mother-in-law
characters.description: Lives with neighbor’s family in cramped cottage.

characters.name: chickens
characters.description: Ten animals contributing to the crowded house problem.

characters.name: donkey
characters.description: Single donkey increasing the crowding and noise inside house.

characters.name: goat
characters.description: Animal added last, further crowding the household.

subpanels.description: Neighbor anxiously approaches Nasruddin in a shaded courtyard, gesturing with open palms to express his cramped house situation.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of a worried, disheveled man leaning forward to speak to a calm, bearded Nasruddin seated on a low bench; warm highlights on rustic textured walls, high-contrast ink style Dialogue context: Neighbor: My house is too crowded—family and mother-in-law all under one tiny roof..

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: My house is too crowded—family and mother-in-law all under one tiny roof.

subpanels.description: Nasruddin strokes his beard thoughtfully while asking a question.
subpanels.prompt: close-up of Nasruddin's face with a subtle smile and knowing eyes, hand near chin, dark ink shadows with warm highlights on face Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Do you keep chickens outside your home?.

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Do you keep chickens outside your home?

subpanels.description: Neighbor nods anxiously looking down at imagined chickens somewhere beyond the frame.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot from slightly above neighbor, hands clasped nervously, warm shadow enveloping his modest clothes, subtle ink strokes defining tension Dialogue context: Neighbor: Yes, several chickens crowded in the yard..

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: Yes, several chickens crowded in the yard.

subpanels.description: Nasruddin calmly advises with a hand gesture suggesting a solution.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of Nasruddin leaning forward slightly, right hand palm open as if offering advice, background with warm glowing light highlighting his face Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Bring the chickens inside your house..

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Bring the chickens inside your house.

subpanels.description: Neighbor, looking frazzled and frustrated, shares his failed attempt bringing chickens indoors.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of neighbor gesturing wildly with both hands, his beard and hair slightly unkempt, faint dark shadows, warm tones highlighting frustration Dialogue context: Neighbor: Bringing chickens inside made everything worse, more crowded and noisy!.

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: Bringing chickens inside made everything worse, more crowded and noisy!

subpanels.description: Nasruddin, calm and curious, asks about presence of a donkey in the yard.
subpanels.prompt: close-up on Nasruddin’s face, eyebrows raised in mild inquiry, ink contrast emphasizing wise expression, warm light on cheekbones Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Is there a donkey kept near your house?.

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Is there a donkey kept near your house?

subpanels.description: Neighbor looks hesitant but replies with a nod, biting his lip.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot focused on neighbor’s conflicted face, warm highlights on eyes, strong shadows outlining a frown Dialogue context: Neighbor: Yes, but bringing it inside will be impossible!.

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: Yes, but bringing it inside will be impossible!

subpanels.description: Nasruddin firmly advises interaction—urging the neighbor to bring donkey indoors regardless.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of Nasruddin seated with one finger raised in emphasis, warm yellow highlights on his traditional clothes, strong ink linework Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Then bring the donkey inside too..

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Then bring the donkey inside too.

subpanels.description: Neighbor returns more distressed, rubbing his temples, surrounded by imagined chaos of family and animals inside.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of neighbor holding head, shadows under eyes, warm amber light contrasts his worn clothes, silhouette of family and animals suggested blurred behind him Dialogue context: Neighbor: The house is unbearable now—too loud, too crowded!.

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: The house is unbearable now—too loud, too crowded!

subpanels.description: Nasruddin, in thoughtful repose, asks if a goat is part of the household.
subpanels.prompt: close-up of Nasruddin looking sideways with a knowing smile, warm highlights on the beard, intricate ink line work emphasizing face wrinkles Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Do you keep a goat as well?.

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Do you keep a goat as well?

subpanels.description: Neighbor visibly frustrated, cheeks flushed, fists clenched at sides.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of neighbor clenching fists, angry expression, warm orange glow on face, ink lines emphasizing tension in hands Dialogue context: Neighbor: Yes! But that would just worsen the problem!.

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: Yes! But that would just worsen the problem!

subpanels.description: Nasruddin calmly insists, advising to bring the goat inside regardless, detected through clear confident gesture.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of Nasruddin with extended hand palm up, steady gaze fixed on neighbor, warm highlight balancing dark shadows Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Then bring the goat inside too..

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Then bring the goat inside too.

subpanels.description: Neighbor angrily leans forward, threatening Nasruddin with finger raised, face tense, lips pressed tight.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot, warm reds highlighting neighbor’s angry face, strong shadows emphasizing furrowed brow and pointed finger, intense ink strokes Dialogue context: Neighbor: If you don't solve this, beware!.

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: If you don't solve this, beware!

subpanels.description: Nasruddin responds serenely, raising an open hand calmly, maintaining eye contact.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of Nasruddin with calm demeanor, warm light glowing behind him, relaxed posture, dark precise ink lines outlining his peaceful face Dialogue context: Nasruddin: Then remove all the animals from your house..

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: Then remove all the animals from your house.

subpanels.description: Neighbor happily reports back, smiling with arms open in a spacious sunlit room free of animals.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of neighbor smiling widely next to bright empty room, warm golden highlights, shadows lifting from his face, ink lines softening Dialogue context: Neighbor: Now the house feels peaceful and spacious!.

bubbles.speaker: Neighbor
bubbles.text: Now the house feels peaceful and spacious!

subpanels.description: Nasruddin smiles gently, hands resting on knees, content with lesson delivered.
subpanels.prompt: medium shot of Nasruddin seated, slight smile, warm light casting soft shadows on face and beard, ink drawing balanced with highlights Dialogue context: Nasruddin: True space comes from removing what crowds the heart..

bubbles.speaker: Nasruddin
bubbles.text: True space comes from removing what crowds the heart.
